label: Cask Prism Chamber
description: Cask Prism Chamber serves as the principal sleeping room of The Sixfold Cask, fitted into a narrow wedge between two structural facets of the prismatic alcove. Dark composite ribs and voidstone trim enforce the port’s polyhedral discipline, while a single calibrated glass pane admits Vesper Filament Port’s stratified radiance as slow, angular bands across the floor. A recessed bunk and built-in locker wall are cut flush to the geometry to minimize vibration transfer from the mooring spines. Luminous linework inlaid along the threshold and skirting renders a subdued navigational script that doubles as low, regulated illumination.
